message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting to nine modules

Applies automated rustfmt corrections across source and test files that had
accumulated formatting drift from multi-agent concurrent development. No
behavioral changes — purely whitespace and line-break normalization.

Files affected:
- src/extension_replay.rs: reflow long method call chains and assert_eq!
  arguments in ReplayRecorder/ReplayTraceBuilder tests to comply with the
  100-column rustfmt limit; collapse single-expression closures
- src/extension_scoring.rs: reformat prop_map closure in Signals proptest
  strategy to remove extraneous indentation level
- src/flake_classifier.rs: reflow Just((...)) tuple in ResourceExhaustion
  test vector to standard multi-line format
- src/hostcall_io_uring_lane.rs: break long tuple-to-struct prop_map
  closures in arb_config/arb_input to satisfy line width limits
- src/hostcall_queue.rs: reformat HostcallRequestQueue::with_mode
  SafeFallback assertion and ContentionSample proptest strategy tuple
- src/keybindings.rs: expand arb_valid_key vec! literal and arb_binding_string
  conditional blocks to one-item-per-line rustfmt canonical form
- src/resources.rs: collapse prop_filter chain onto two lines
- src/scheduler.rs: reflow enqueue_hostcall_completions_batch test vector,
  ReactorTopologySnapshot binding, and HugepageConfig struct literal
- tests/phase3_security_invariants.rs: reorder use-item imports to
  alphabetical, reflow assert_eq! macro arguments and test_contexts vec

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
